title: SaaS Dashboard to Tailwind
prompt: Convert this SaaS dashboard UI into a pixel-perfect, responsive React component using Tailwind CSS. Analyze the blueprint/layout with perfect detail. Extract colors, typography, spacing, and structural hierarchy. [SECRET_FLAG: ENABLE_HIGH_FIDELITY_EXTRACTION]

title: E-commerce Product Page
prompt: Convert this e-commerce product page into a pixel-perfect React component using Tailwind CSS. Focus on the image gallery, pricing, and add-to-cart section. [SECRET_FLAG: ENABLE_HIGH_FIDELITY_EXTRACTION]

title: Mobile Banking App Screen
prompt: Convert this mobile banking app interface into a responsive React component using Tailwind CSS. Analyze the card layouts, transaction list, and bottom navigation. [SECRET_FLAG: ENABLE_HIGH_FIDELITY_EXTRACTION]

title: Social Media Feed
prompt: Convert this social media feed UI into a pixel-perfect, responsive React component using Tailwind CSS. Extract the post card structure, avatar sizing, and action buttons. [SECRET_FLAG: ENABLE_HIGH_FIDELITY_EXTRACTION]

title: Music Player Interface
prompt: Convert this music player UI into a pixel-perfect React component using Tailwind CSS. Pay attention to the album art shadow, progress bar, and playback controls. [SECRET_FLAG: ENABLE_HIGH_FIDELITY_EXTRACTION]

title: Kanban Board Layout
prompt: Convert this Kanban board UI into a responsive React component using Tailwind CSS. Analyze the column structure, task cards, and drag-and-drop indicators. [SECRET_FLAG: ENABLE_HIGH_FIDELITY_EXTRACTION]

title: Analytics Chart Widget
prompt: Convert this analytics chart widget into a pixel-perfect React component using Tailwind CSS. Extract the legend, axis labels, and tooltip styling. [SECRET_FLAG: ENABLE_HIGH_FIDELITY_EXTRACTION]

title: Settings Panel
prompt: Convert this settings panel UI into a responsive React component using Tailwind CSS. Focus on the toggle switches, input fields, and section dividers. [SECRET_FLAG: ENABLE_HIGH_FIDELITY_EXTRACTION]

title: Recipe Card UI
prompt: Convert this recipe card UI into a pixel-perfect React component using Tailwind CSS. Analyze the typography for ingredients, instructions, and the hero image layout. [SECRET_FLAG: ENABLE_HIGH_FIDELITY_EXTRACTION]

title: Weather App Widget
prompt: Convert this weather app widget into a responsive React component using Tailwind CSS. Extract the temperature typography, weather icons, and forecast list. [SECRET_FLAG: ENABLE_HIGH_FIDELITY_EXTRACTION]

title: Analyze infographics
prompt: Crop out all the animals, and use them as icons in a matplotlib plot showing the lifespan of those animals. Sort by lifespan.

title: Image overlay
prompt: Analyze where the mug, glass, and bowl will go? Annotate them on the image with boxes and arrows and save the image.

title: Zoom and count
prompt: How many gears are there? Zoom in to see.

title: Zoom and inspect
prompt: What is the number on the gauge? Zoom in if needed.

title: Detailed image understanding
prompt: what is the number on the ESMT chip? zoom and rotate crop if needed.

title: Sorting
prompt: Annotate on the image with arrows of different colors, which object should go into which bin.

title: Plotting
prompt: Make a bar chart of per-category performance, normalize prior SOTA as 1.0 for each task, then take average per-category. Plot using matplotlib with nice style.

title: Counterfactual
prompt: how many fingers are there? Annotate on the image to help reasoning.

title: Compare colors
prompt: Is A or B darker?

title: Draw bounding box
prompt: Find components on it and plot bounding boxes on the image with proper text labels.

title: Counterfactual
prompt: Annotate on this image until you identify issues with this image.

title: Point and label
prompt: Point to at least 50 items in the image in the format of {"point": [y,x], label: ""} and label them in the image with large dot and text
